items.text:
Notice: Fitness Center Fall Reopening

The Anderson Recreation Center will reopen for the fall semester on September 2. Regular hours are 6:00 AM to 11:00 PM, Monday through Friday, and 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekends. All students must tap a valid ID card at the entrance to gain access.

A locker rental is available for $15 per semester and may be reserved at the front desk. Personal training sessions can be booked online through the campus portal. Please note the following rules:

- Proper athletic shoes are required in all workout areas.
- Equipment must be wiped down after each use.
- Guests are not permitted without prior approval.

For questions, contact the Recreation Office or visit Room 120.

questions.stem: According to the notice, how much does a locker rental cost?
questions.explanation: The notice states a locker rental is available for $15 per semester.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who want to bring a guest?

options.A: Guests may enter during regular weekend hours.
options.B: Guests must receive approval before their visit.
options.C: Guests are given a complimentary locker rental.
options.D: Guests can reserve personal training sessions online.

questions.explanation: Because guests are not permitted without prior approval, a student must get approval before bringing one.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this notice?

options.A: To announce the fitness center's fall reopening and rules.
options.B: To promote a private personal training business nearby.
options.C: To request student donations for new gym equipment.
options.D: To report an increase in semester tuition costs.

questions.explanation: The notice announces the reopening date, hours, fees, and usage rules of the recreation center.
